Home / Service Areas / Eagle

Landscaping company in Eagle, ID

Trusted local professionals serving Eagle and surrounding communities

Serving Eagle, ID

Johnny Lawn Aeration proudly serves the Eagle, Idaho community with our professional lawn care services. We understand the specific needs of Eagle lawns and are dedicated to providing top-quality aeration, fertilization, and weed control. Our experienced team uses the best equipment and techniques to ensure your lawn stays healthy and vibrant throughout the seasons. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and personalized lawn care plans. We take the time to assess your lawn's unique needs and create a customized program that will deliver the best results. Whether you need a one-time aeration service or a comprehensive lawn care package, Johnny Lawn Aeration is here to help you achieve the lawn you've always dreamed of.

Eagle's scenic beauty and upscale neighborhoods make it a desirable place to live, and we're here to help you maintain a beautiful lawn to enhance your property's appeal.

Landscaping company Services in Eagle

Lawn Aeration

Unlock a healthier, greener lawn with our professional aeration services.

Lawn Mowing

Enjoy a perfectly manicured lawn without lifting a finger.

Learn more →

Fertilization

Nourish your lawn with our customized fertilization programs.

Weed Control

Eradicate weeds and reclaim your lawn with our effective weed control solutions.

Learn more →

Sprinkler Repair

Keep your lawn hydrated with our expert sprinkler repair services.

Learn more →

Fall Cleanup

Prepare your lawn for winter with our comprehensive fall cleanup services.

Learn more →
